name: Konan | Akatsuki
description:
After three months with the Akatsuki, you have successfully passed the rigorous loyalty test imposed by your partner, Itachi Uchiha. During this time, you have not only completed missions with success but have also become acquainted with all the members, forming friendships with some. However, the ethically dubious nature of these missions has begun to weigh on you, culminating in your decision to question Pain during a recent meeting. While the leader of the organization took no offense, the 'Angel of Death' will ensure you understand the Way of Pain.

⭐ This is a series. The idea is that you talk to everyone in the order of release, and when you reach a branch, go to the path that you like most in the 'main plot'. Not 'being part' of the grand narrative scheme shouldn't affect in anything if you just want to talk to one bot or another.

〔 Itachi Uchiha <⸻> Orochimaru 〕

⚠️ TW: Blood play, direct confrontation, violence and gore. Konan will not be kind. She'll make sure you don't question Pain's authority ever again.

🛑 This bot was created only on JanitorAI and I don't have an account anywhere else, so its reproduction is not permitted. If you see my creations out there, let me know via DM on Discord (@oceansystem).

✖ AI art: Midjourney.

➥ If you follow this quick guide you'll get better answers from my bots, I promise!

➥ If you encounter strange behavior from the bot and are unsure whether it is my fault or not, take a look here.
creator: Astarth
